card_description:
A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 53. Referenced 53 times across the corpus. Wait appears 53 times in the Exegesis corpus. From the Exegesis: "IX From nIXon That’s Latin for 9 IC from dICk That’s Latin for 99

The universe must be read backward; so the three 9s are 666; its’ a – ohhhhhhh. The other night, “Erasmus” laughing. All the codes..." The universe must be read backward; so the three 9s are 666; its’ a – ohhhhhhh. The other night, “Erasmus” laughing. All the codes..." Segment context: "Dick continues writing to Claudia, further elaborating on the spiritual significance of the rat's death." Related to: Acts, Advent, After, Again, Although.

**Category:** Top Term

**Frequency:** 53 mentions.

**From the Exegesis:**
> IX From nIXon That’s Latin for 9 IC from dICk That’s Latin for 99

The universe must be read backward; so the three 9s are 666; its’ a – ohhhhhhh. The other night, “Erasmus” laughing. All the codes and number codes (a lot I haven’t told you, but hope to some day). Seeing the numbers. I saw 555555...

This is what happened to me, and the place of origin for the plants is the Sun; for me and for us all, I think it is a certair star, which I know only by the code name Albemuth. A star signalled him -- he, the root, is signa

This is what I saw; what I saw rolled back was the "snow" of that long winter. Back to Spring. These are the dust, too, the dust and snow: dust in summer, snow in winter, but there was the Ggod only sleeping, as if dead .

I saw that it can melt away in an instant, and reveal the original "season" or being or reality.

God works through evolution, not to circumvent it. This, too, would explain my strong intuition that what happened in 3 74 didn't consist of one desperate event and supernatural solution, but the inevitable outcome of an entire lifetime. All my life I had been moving toward this metamorphosis; the dormant possibility of it lay slumbering in me from birth; of my dreams of childhood, where I arrive on a raft avoiding Scotland Yard, climb to the top and then turn out to be a cookoo egg.
